title: NATS Messaging Dashboard
description: Complete production monitoring for NATS messaging: connections, messages, JetStream, clustering, and resources.

panels.title: Connection Utilization %
panels.description: Percentage of max connections in use.

panels.title: Slow Consumers
panels.description: Active slow consumers. Non-zero = clients can't keep up.

panels.title: Pending Bytes
panels.description: Bytes pending in send buffer. High = backpressure.

panels.title: Cache Hit Rate
panels.description: Subscription cache hit rate. Higher is better.

panels.title: CPU Usage
panels.description: CPU cores consumed. 0-1 = 0-100% of one core.

panels.title: Open File Descriptors
panels.description: Open FDs. Watch for approaching max.

panels.title: Streams Overview - Message Count
panels.description: All JetStream streams sorted by message count (similar to 'nats stream ls').

queries.query:
SELECT stream_name, value
FROM (
  SELECT
    stream_name,
    value,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY stream_name
      ORDER BY _timestamp DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM jetstream_stream_total_messages
  WHERE server_id IN ($server_id)
) t
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY value DESC;

panels.title: Streams Overview - Size (Bytes)

queries.query: SELECT stream_name, value FROM ( SELECT stream_name, value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY stream_name ORDER BY _timestamp DESC ) AS rn FROM jetstream_stream_total_messages WHERE server_id IN ($server_id) ) t WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY value DESC;

panels.title: Streams Overview - Consumer Count

queries.query: SELECT stream_name, value FROM ( SELECT stream_name, value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY stream_name ORDER BY _timestamp DESC ) AS rn FROM jetstream_stream_consumer_count WHERE server_id IN ($server_id) ) t WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY value DESC;

panels.title: Top Streams by Message Count
panels.description: Streams with the most messages stored.

panels.title: Streams with Consumers
panels.description: Consumer count by stream (only streams with consumers).

panels.title: Consumer Lag (Messages)
panels.description: Consumer lag per consumer - number of messages behind the stream. 0 = caught up.

queries.query:
SELECT
  stream_name,
  consumer_name,
  value,
  CONCAT(stream_name, '_', consumer_name) AS stream_consumer
FROM (
  SELECT
    stream_name,
    consumer_name,
    value,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY stream_name, consumer_name
      ORDER BY _timestamp DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM jetstream_consumer_lag
  WHERE server_id IN ($server_id)
) t
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY value DESC;

panels.title: Consumer Idle Time (Seconds)
panels.description: Seconds since last consumer activity. Lower is better - shows consumers are actively processing.

queries.query:
SELECT
  stream_name,
  consumer_name,
  value,
  CONCAT(stream_name, '_', consumer_name) AS stream_consumer
FROM (
  SELECT
    stream_name,
    consumer_name,
    value,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
      PARTITION BY stream_name, consumer_name
      ORDER BY _timestamp DESC
    ) AS rn
  FROM jetstream_consumer_idle_seconds
  WHERE server_id IN ($server_id)
) t
WHERE rn = 1
ORDER BY value DESC

panels.title: Consumer Lag Over Time
panels.description: Track consumer lag trends - spikes indicate consumers falling behind.

panels.title: Consumer Idle Time Over Time
panels.description: Track consumer activity - spikes indicate periods of inactivity.
